metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5163
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 6, 7, 8: immunogold-EM of the hippocampus showed MGL (monoacylglycerol lipase, gene MGLL) was exclusively localized to symmetric and asymmetric presynaptic terminals (i.e. not postsynaptic).

Figure 10: in the amygdala, MGL immunostaining was present presynaptically in subsets of axon terminals.

The ultrastructural distribution of MGL and FAAH in the amygdala, similar to the hippocampus, is complementary: i.e. FAAH is located postsynaptically, MGL presynaptically.. Experimental description: Both mice and rats were used. Assume rat was used in the EM localizations, as the title of the paper states: "Segregation of two endocannabinoid-hydrolyzing enzymes into pre- and postsynaptic compartments in the rat hippocampus, cerebellum and amygdala"

antibody:
rabbit anti-MGL serum (Dinh et al., 2002) PMID:12136125

controls:
"In case of MGL the antibody was preabsorbed with the immunizing peptide (SSPRRTPQNVPYQDL)."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
